title: rotatedshovels
description:
Rotates your shovels (like in Shadow of Israphel)

Does not override textures and (should be) compatible with other packs
body:
# rotatedshovels

__Rotates your shovels in Minecraft__

Based on how they were done in Shadow of Israphel, but with improvements to other display types.

Compatible with all packs (make sure to keep this at the top!)

**Only affects vanilla shovels!**

![Alt text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/jIecENCu/images/075f70844f698e1095dd75933fd328cb44984c2f.png 'Inventory Icons')
